children.text: A long time ago, people were very different from the way we are now.
children.cn: 很久以前，人们与现在的我们非常不同。
children.notes: different from: 与...不同
children.statement: 过去的人们和现在的我们非常相似。
children.explanation: 文中说人们过去和现在非常不同 (very different)。

children.text: For example, if you find a really old house somewhere, you'll see that the doors are usually much lower than they are today.
children.cn: 例如，如果你在某个地方发现一所非常古老的房子，你会发现门通常比现在的要矮得多。
children.notes: lower: 更矮 (low的比较级)
children.statement: 古老房子的门通常比现代的门要高。

children.text: Why?
children.cn: 为什么？

children.text: Because hundreds of years ago, people were shorter.
children.cn: 因为几百年前，人们更矮。
children.notes: hundreds of: 数以百计的
children.statement: 几百年前的人比现在的人矮。
children.explanation: 文中提到几百年前的人更矮 (shorter)。

children.text: Over time, the human body changes to adapt to a new way of life.
children.cn: 随着时间的推移，人体会发生变化以适应新的生活方式。
children.notes: adapt to: 适应
children.statement: 人体的变化是为了适应新的生活方式。
children.explanation: 这是文章的核心观点。 adapt to 意为“适应”。

children.text: Can we expect the human body to change in the future?
children.cn: 我们可以预见人体在未来会发生变化吗？
children.notes: expect: 预见，期待

children.text: For sure.
children.cn: 肯定会。
children.notes: For sure: 肯定，毫无疑问

children.text: And the main reason is that we have more and more technology, and it is changing how we live.
children.cn: 主要原因是我们的科技越来越多，它正在改变我们的生活方式。
children.notes: more and more: 越来越多的
children.statement: 科技是导致身体变化的主要原因。
children.explanation: 文中明确提到科技是主要原因 (main reason)。

children.text: Well, no one can be 100 per cent sure, but here are some possibilities.
children.cn: 嗯，没有人能百分之百确定，但这里有一些可能性。
children.notes: possibility: 可能性
children.statement: 作者对自己接下来要说的内容完全确定。
children.explanation: 作者说是“可能性” (possibilities)，没有人能 100% 确定。

children.text: Humans are now ten centimetres taller than 150 years ago.
children.cn: 人类现在比150年前高出10厘米。
children.notes: centimetres: 厘米; taller: 更高
children.statement: 人类的身高在过去150年里增加了10厘米。

children.text: So, in the future, people will probably be even taller.
children.cn: 所以，在未来，人们可能会更高。
children.notes: even taller: 甚至更高
children.statement: 作者预测未来的人会变矮。

children.text: Most of us now have much better food than people in the past and so we grow more.
children.cn: 我们现在大多数人都有比过去好得多的食物，所以我们长得更多。
children.notes: grow more: 生长更多
children.statement: 更好的营养导致人们长得更高。

children.text: We'll get weaker in more than one way.
children.cn: 我们会在不止一方面变得更虚弱。
children.notes: more than one way: 不止一种方式

children.text: The most important way is that our muscles will not be as strong as now because we won't do a lot of physical work.
children.cn: 最重要的一点是，我们的肌肉不会像现在这样强壮，因为我们将不再做大量的体力活。
children.notes: muscles: 肌肉; physical work: 体力活
children.statement: 因为体力活变少，我们的肌肉会变弱。

children.text: We are already using our feet less, and our hands more (think about computers and tablets and so on).
children.cn: 我们已经减少了脚的使用，增加了对手的使用（想想电脑和平板电脑等等）。
children.notes: already: 已经; and so on: 等等

children.text: So we can expect that our legs will get shorter and our feet smaller, and at the same time, our fingers will get longer.
children.cn: 我们可以预见，我们的腿会变短，脚会变小，与此同时，我们的手指会变长。
children.notes: shorter: 更短; longer: 更长

children.text: And our fingers and our eyes will both get better, because they'll have to do more work together.
children.cn: 我们的手指和眼睛都会变得更好，因为它们必须更多地合作。
children.notes: both: 两者都; together: 一起
children.statement: 眼睛和手指的协作会让它们变得更好。

children.text: Now, what about the mouth?
children.cn: 现在，那嘴巴呢？

children.text: It'll get smaller, perhaps, because technological improvements will mean that we don't need to talk so much...
children.cn: 它可能会变小，也许是因为技术的进步将意味着我们不需要说这么多话……
children.notes: technological improvements: 技术进步

children.text: ...and also because our teeth will get smaller (so mouths don't need to be so big to keep them in).
children.cn: ……也因为我们的牙齿会变小（所以嘴巴不需要那么大来装下它们）。
children.notes: keep them in: 把它们装在里面

children.text: Here's a good one - it's very possible that people will have four toes, not five.
children.cn: 这是一个很有趣的观点——很有可能人们会有四只脚趾，而不是五只。

children.text: The little toe really isn't needed any more (people who lose them don't miss them) so it will probably disappear some time in the future.
children.cn: 小脚趾真的不再需要了（失去它们的人并不会想念它们），所以它在未来的某个时候可能会消失。
children.notes: disappear: 消失; miss: 想念，缺失

children.text: And last but not least - people won't have as much hair on their bodies as now, as we don't need it to keep ourselves warm any more.
children.cn: 最后同样重要的是，人们身体上的毛发不会像现在这么多了，因为我们不再需要它来保暖了。
children.notes: last but not least: 最后但同样重要; keep warm: 保暖
children.highlight: And last but not least, as

children.text: Will all these things happen?
children.cn: 所有这些事情都会发生吗？

children.text: And if so, when?
children.cn: 如果会，那是什么时候？

children.text: These are questions that no one can answer for sure.
children.cn: 这些都是没有人能够确切回答的问题。
children.statement: 目前没有人能百分之百确定这些预测何时或是否会发生。
